title: Withdrawal processing times
content: Withdrawals are reviewed and processed within 1-3 business days depending on payment method, verification status, and internal checks. Support agents cannot promise acceleration.

title: Duplicate card charges
content: Some card providers may show temporary duplicate authorisations. Customers should be asked for the transaction date, last 4 digits, amount, and screenshot if available. Refunds must not be promised before payment investigation.

title: Verification review
content: Identity verification is handled through the verification workflow. Support may explain expected review times but cannot manually approve an account outside the process.

title: Account closure
content: Before account closure, customers should withdraw available funds and resolve open positions or pending obligations. Support can explain the steps but should confirm any irreversible action clearly.

title: Tone and safety guidelines
content: Responses must be polite, concise, and avoid guarantees, legal claims, or unsupported promises. If the issue requires investigation or account-specific action, the reply should explain next steps and escalate when necessary.
